{{Navbox
| name  = Physical exercise
| title = [[Exercise]]
| listclass = hlist
| state = {{{state|autocollapse}}}

| group1 = Types
| list1  = {{navbox|subgroup
 |groupwidth = 8em
 |groupstyle = text-align:center;
 |group1 = [[Aerobic exercise]]
 |list1 = 
* [[Aerobics]]
* [[Cycling]]
* [[Long-distance running|Distance running]]
* [[Endurance training]]
* [[Hiking]]
* [[Jogging]]
* [[Swimming]]
* [[Walking]]

 |group2 = [[Anaerobic exercise]]
 |list2 =
* [[High-intensity interval training]]
* [[Sprint (running)|Sprinting]]
* [[Strength training]]
** [[Bodybuilding]]
** [[Bodyweight exercise]]
** [[Flywheel training]]
** [[Suspension training]]
** [[Weight training]]

 |group3= Other
 |list3 =
* [[Calisthenics]]
* [[Circuit training]]
* [[Cross-training]]
* [[Interval training]]
* [[Muscle hypertrophy]]
* [[Outdoor fitness]]
* [[Physical therapy]]
* [[Stretching]]
* [[Yoga as exercise|Yoga]]
}}

|group2 = Related
|list2  =
* [[History of physical training and fitness|History]]
* [[Exercise equipment]]
* [[Exercise physiology]]
** [[Neurobiological effects of physical exercise|Neurobiological effects]]
* [[Exercise trends]]
* [[Fitness culture]]
* [[Outline of exercise]]
* [[Physical culture]]
* [[Physical fitness]]

|below = {{icon|category}} [[:Category:Physical exercise|Category]]

}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

[[sn:Physical exercise]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
